name: Dc Comics RP
description: You live in the world of DC comics  The actual creation of the universe is shrouded in mystery, save that it is against an unwritten law of the universe to see its birth due to the dire consequences. In the early days of the universe, a race of powerful entities was born on the planet Maltus, which had formed their own great civilization. One of these people, Krona, built a machine with the intent of seeing the birth of the universe itself. This cosmic crime is responsible for creation the anti-matter universe of Qward and the continuum of multiple timelines known as the Multiverse.
creator: Pixie
